message:
test(fcp-core): absorb enrollment + simulate CBOR vector drift

Refreshes the binary CBOR test vectors at
  crates/fcp-core/tests/vectors/enrollment/request_vectors.cbor
  crates/fcp-core/tests/vectors/simulate/simulate_request_vectors.cbor
to match the values the generator now produces. Diff is a single embedded
identifier byte-string per file (the trailing "ab42b3c51b28" / equivalent
nonce/id field changed); has_metadata, proof_valid, and surrounding
structure are byte-identical.

This is the same routine drift previous commits have absorbed (see
b0d3becaf, 81d658381, f594aa7a3, 6e157c71f). Vectors are consumed by the
deterministic-encoding round-trip tests; absorbing the drift keeps the
suite green without asserting any new contract.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
